steps.title: Emphasize the proportion
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how many islands in the park have Komodo dragons. The useful notes are that the park has twenty-nine islands and that Komodo dragons live on four of them.

steps.title: Include both numbers
steps.content: Choice A and choice B omit the number of islands with Komodo dragons. Choice D gives the total number of islands but omits the dragons. The statement using "only four of the twenty-nine" directly emphasizes the small proportion. The answer is C.
